signals.reasoning: Cover the live TON short now. It has only retained about 19% of peak P&L, warning level is urgent, and there is still no valid stop in place, so this is protect-the-remainder logic rather than a hold.
BTC is already in a liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short after the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is still down and the tape still shows fresh shorts pressing rather than a clean reversal.
DASH is already in a hard liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
RESOLV is bouncing on a short-covering pattern and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh fade.
WCT is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
BLUR has strong squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
MERL is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
